title: National Public Transit Collapse
description: A major software failure shuts down public transit systems across multiple cities.

B.title: Force transit workers to operate manually

C.title: Suspend transit until systems are repaired

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Emergency shuttles keep the economy moving while repairs are underway.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Forcing workers to operate manually is unsafe and violates labor rights.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Suspending transit entirely would cripple businesses and workers.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: But safety must come first. People shouldn’t be forced into dangerous conditions.
